$schema_comment: Reconciliation evidence artifact schema. Introduced in W5-reconciliation.
This file is a TEMPLATE. Real reconciliation runs write to:
.tl/reconciliation/<ISO-8601-utc>.json           (conductor Phase 4.5)
.tl/reconciliation/<ISO-8601-utc>-publish.json   (nacl-publish gate)
Producers:
- nacl-tl-conductor / Phase 4.5 (Cross-artifact reconciliation)
- nacl-publish (Pre-publish reconciliation gate)
Sources of truth checked by the conductor (six):
1. .tl/status.json
2. .tl/conductor-state.json
3. .tl/changelog.md
4. Live Neo4j graph (LIVE READS ONLY — no .cypher export fallback)
5. .tl/release-status.json
6. .tl/exceptions/ (active vs expired signed exceptions, W4 schema)
Pairwise checks (conductor):
P-S1  status.json totals vs live graph counts
P-S2  changelog.md FR entries vs graph FeatureRequest nodes
P-S3  release-status.json release_tag vs graph release_tag property
P-S4  conductor-state.json phase markers vs status.json terminal statuses
P-S5  conductor-state.json per-task entries vs graph Task.status
Pairwise checks (publish subset):
P-P1  changelog.md released FR list vs graph FeatureRequest
P-P2  changelog.md released UC list vs graph UseCase
P-P3  release-status.json.release_tag vs graph release_tag properties
Live-graph-only binding: if the project's graph container is
unreachable, do NOT fall back to a stale .cypher export. Emit
terminal_status = 'BLOCKED' with workflow_detail = 'graph_unavailable'
and refuse to advance.
intake_id: <conductor intake id or null for publish-only runs>

sources_checked.name: live_graph
sources_checked.fallback_used: NEVER — live reads only per W5 binding

deltas.assertion: status.json totals match live graph counts
every FR in latest changelog section exists as FeatureRequest node
release-status.json release_tag present in graph release_tag property
if conductor-state phase == quality_gate_passed then no pending/in_progress remain in status.json
every conductor-state task entry status matches live graph Task.status
